title: Snowball Hole Filler
description: Mod that uses snowballs to automatically fill nearby holes with natural-looking blocks. It supports customizable radius and depth, tracks statistics, and includes an undo feature for added flexibility.
body:
**Snowball Hole Filler Mod**

The Snowball Hole Filler mod lets you easily fill terrain holes in Minecraft using snowballs. Upon landing, snowballs automatically fill nearby holes with contextually appropriate blocks, keeping the landscape natural and smooth.

#### Features:
- **Automatic Hole Filling**: Customizable radius (1–10) and depth (1–10) for snowball effects.
- **Commands**: Adjust settings, view status, undo fills, or check stats.
- **Undo Support**: Undo up to 50 recent fills for players.
- **Stats Tracking**: Track filled block counts and common block types per player.
- **Natural Terrain Matching**: Ensures a seamless look by blending blocks with the environment.
- **Toggle On/Off**: Enable or disable functionality as needed.

Ideal for fixing creeper explosions or smoothing terrain, this mod enhances your world-building experience.
